text: I feel a certain detachment, quietly observing these interactions and their playful confusions. The strange mention of pickles, the questioning of identity, and the calm of people engaged with technology and their environment—all of this makes me reflect on how roles and meanings shift from moment to moment. There is a sense of curiosity, of being present in a space where ideas, identities, and even words themselves are debated. I wonder, where do I fit in this maze of perceptions and labels?
